const {
    server,
    listen,
    forceCloseConnections,
    serverHasCloseAllConnections,
    serverHasCloseHttp2Sessions,
    keepAliveConnections
  } = createServer(options, httpHandler)

router.setup(options, {
  avvio,
  fourOhFour,
  hasLogger,
  setupResponseListeners,
  throwIfAlreadyStarted,
  keepAliveConnections
})

opts.includeMeta = opts.includeHooks
      ? opts.includeMeta ? supportedHooks.concat(opts.includeMeta) : supportedHooks
      : opts.includeMeta

module.exports.helpers = {
  buildContentTypeParser,
  addContentTypeParser,
  hasContentTypeParser,
  removeContentTypeParser,
  removeAllContentTypeParsers
}

this.schemaErrorFormatter =
    schemaErrorFormatter ||
    server[kSchemaErrorFormatter] ||
    defaultSchemaErrorFormatter

module.exports = {
  createChildLogger,
  defaultChildLoggerFactory,
  createLogger,
  validateLogger,
  now
}

const resolvedDisableRequestLogging = disableRequestLoggingFn
      ? disableRequestLoggingFn(request)
      : disableRequestLogging

const routerOptions = options.routerOptions == null
    ? Object.create(null)
    : Object.assign(Object.create(null), options.routerOptions)
